vulnerability.reference: Open-access evasion datasets lower the skill barrier for producing NSFW imagery, enabling widespread abuse.
vulnerability.generated: General public lacks user-side detection or filtering, relying entirely on platform safety mechanisms that can be circumvented.

impact.reference: Proliferation of non-consensual intimate imagery and sexualized violence deepens online harassment and social harm.
impact.generated: Widespread exposure to NSFW AI-generated imagery causes psychological distress and erosion of public trust in generative AI safety.

dose_response.reference: Automated discovery of prompt vulnerabilities enables systematic defeat of safety mechanisms via public evasion datasets, exposing the general public to non-consensual intimate imagery that deepens online harassment and social harm.
dose_response.generated: Automated discovery of prompt-level vulnerabilities enabling bypass of NSFW controls, through online exposure, triggers reliance on platform mechanisms without user filters, leading to psychological distress and eroded public trust.
